homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track serves as a perfect accompaniment for a cozy coffee shop, where soothing acoustic guitar and a gentle rhythm establish a relaxing atmosphere. The music maintains a happy and easygoing mood, blending elements of pop and folk to create an ideal background soundscape for a laid-back evening.

prompts.0: Does this caption contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, caption completely unrelated to the audio) to 7 (best, completely related)

questions.name: Sample 3
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental hip-hop track centers on a repetitive drum machine loop that creates an infectious, steady groove. Occasional claps and fills punctuate the beat, reinforcing the chill yet energetic atmosphere suitable for relaxed gatherings or background music. The sound blends electronic percussion with subtle synth elements to evoke a nostalgic, laid-back vibe reminiscent of classic lounge jams.

CAPTION:

The easygoing rhythm creates a nostalgic atmosphere with a distinct country twang that evokes a laid-back countryside vibe. The music is well-suited for a casual road trip or an evening listening session in the mountains.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This track is a serene field recording featuring the natural sounds of flowing water, captured using high-quality binaural microphones. The gentle, steady rhythm of the stream creates an immersive and calming atmosphere perfect for relaxation or unwinding. Although the metadata suggests some electronic elements, the primary focus remains on the authentic acoustic textures of the environment.

questions.name: About You
questions.description: Please tell us about your musical background.

fields.label: How many years of musical experience do you have?
Please describe your musical experience (instruments played, training, listening habits, etc.)
fields.placeholder: e.g. I've played piano for 10 years and studied music theory in college...
